seo.title: Support Nguyen Minh Thien | Indie Developer
seo.description: Support Nguyen Minh Thien, an indie developer building lightweight tools and useful apps. Donations are optional and help maintain and improve projects.

hero.tagline: I build small tools to make life simpler.

about.title: About
about.body: I am an indie developer creating practical apps and lightweight tools. I focus on solving everyday problems and improving workflows in simple, reliable ways. I build with care so each project stays useful and easy to use.

item1.title: Productivity Tools
item1.desc: Small utilities that remove friction and save time in daily work.

item2.title: Workflow Systems
item2.desc: Simple structures that help individuals and teams stay organized.

item3.title: Lightweight Apps
item3.desc: Fast, focused apps designed for clarity, reliability, and ease of use.

donation.title: Support My Work
donation.subtitle: If my projects help you, you can support me through any method below. Your support is optional and always appreciated.

bmac.title: Buy Me a Coffee
bmac.desc: A quick way to send support.
bmac.cta: Donate via Buy Me a Coffee

bank.title: Bank Transfer

trust.title: Thank You
trust.body: Your support helps me maintain existing projects and build better updates over time. Donations are always optional, and I am grateful for any support, feedback, or encouragement.

contact.title: Contact & Feedback
contact.subtitle: Feel free to report bugs, send feedback, or share ideas for future tools.

footer.line: Built with care. Thanks for visiting.
